title: Dev Archaeology Project Configuration
description: Schema for project-specific configuration files used by the dev-archaeology forensic mining pipeline. Each project gets a project.json under projects/<name>/.

name.description: Unique project identifier. Must match the directory name under projects/.

description.description: Human-readable one-line description of the project.

repo_path.description: Absolute local path to the git repository on disk. Used for local data extraction.

repo_url.description: HTTPS URL of the GitHub repository.

developer.description: Information about the primary developer of the project.

timeline.description: Date range of the archaeology analysis window.

start_date.description: ISO 8601 date for the start of the analysis period.

end_date.description: ISO 8601 date for the end of the analysis period.

total_days.description: Total number of days in the analysis window.

overrides.description: Manual overrides for statistics that would otherwise be computed automatically. Use when the automated extraction produces incorrect counts.

era_count.description: Number of developmental eras detected in the project history.

total_commits.description: Total number of commits in the primary repository during the analysis window.

cross_repo_commits.description: Total commits across all related repositories during the analysis window.

repos_analyzed.description: Number of GitHub repositories included in the analysis.

sessions_analyzed.description: Number of AI coding tool sessions extracted and analyzed.

active_days.description: Number of active development days in the analysis window.

visualization.description: Configuration for the archaeology.html visualization output.

title.description: Main title displayed in the visualization header.

subtitle.description: Subtitle displayed below the main title.

counters.description: Key statistics displayed as counter widgets in the visualization.

value.description: The counter value. Can be a number or a formatted string (e.g. '104K').

agent_colors.description: Color assignments for each AI agent/collaborator. Keys are agent names, values are hex colors.

era_colors.description: Color assignments for each developmental era. Keys are era identifiers (era-NN format), values are hex colors.

data_sources.description: Paths and settings for data extraction sources.

sessions_dir.description: Path to the directory containing AI tool session logs (e.g. Claude Code project directory). Supports ~ for home directory.

youtube_takeout.description: Filename of the YouTube takeout data file relative to the project data directory.

github_api.description: Whether to use the GitHub API for repository metadata extraction.

github_pipeline.description: Path to GitHub pipeline logs or repository for pipeline telemetry.

session_archaeology.description: Path to additional session archaeology source data.

dogfood_campaigns.description: Path to dogfood campaign results data.

external.description: Additional project-specific external data source paths.
